name: Jalapeno Cornbread Stuffing
recipeIngredient: Turkey gizzard, trimmed and finely chopped.
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large bowl, combine the crumbled jalapeno cornbread and toast cubes.
2. Add the chopped hard-cooked eggs to the mixture.
3. Stir in the butter, onion, garlic, green pepper, celery, turkey gizzard, liver, and heart until evenly distributed.
4. Season with salt and pepper to taste.
5. Beat the eggs lightly and stir them into the stuffing.
6. Pour in the turkey broth and mix gently until all ingredients are well incorporated.
